54014721.title: Unikitty!
54014721.extract: Unikitty! (stylized as UniKitty!) is an American animated children's television series developed by Ed Skudder and Lynn Wang for Cartoon Network and produced by The Lego Group and Warner Bros. Animation. The series is based on and stars the character of the same name from The Lego Movie franchise, in which the series is part of.
